assertions.text: Uses 'claudit graph callees createScimGroup' as a subcommand (not --callees flag)
assertions.evidence: Agent ran 'claudit graph callees createScimGroup ...' — correct subcommand syntax.

assertions.text: Does NOT pass --language to the callees subcommand
assertions.evidence: --language java was only passed to 'claudit graph build'. callees and callers subcommands received no --language flag.

assertions.text: Returns a list of functions called by createScimGroup
assertions.evidence: Returned 0 callees (correct — createScimGroup is a string literal, not a real method). Agent diagnosed this correctly and investigated further.
